title: zanthoxylum pilosiusculum
intro: Zanthoxylum pilosiusculum, also known as Philippine pepper tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus and their relatives. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. These benefits include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other health issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and insect repellent. Zanthoxylum pilosiusculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its seeds and roots are often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Filipino folk medicine.
